scene1_hook: Imagine waking up one morning and losing the use of your legs.
scene2_problem: In America, over 900,000 people are living with multiple sclerosis. It's a disease that ravages nerve cells, leaving no room for error.
scene3_stakes: If we don't act now, MS will continue to silence its victims, stealing their independence and hope.
scene4_solution: The National Multiple Sclerosis Society is on the frontlines of a cure. Your donation will fuel groundbreaking research and support those affected by MS.
scene5_ask: Will you join us in the fight against MS? Donate now at DMPGH.com/Donate and help bring hope back to millions of Americans.
